name_cn:
Chane1 New 22 Bag is here!!️
Original leather 22 White Gold Small: 3260
✨Hot New Arrival Chane1 22Bag
Whether it's called a "trash bag" or a "shopping bag"
It just hits the spot 🍃
The one named after the year number is the one to watch!!
Definitely the ceiling of classics ✔️
The look is amazing, spacious, and beautiful.
The casual, soft texture creates a unique style.
Hardware: Thick plated vintage gold buckle
Leather: Original calf leather
Size: 35*37*8cm
9788025
